title: alchemilla fissa subsp. pubescens
intro: Alchemilla fissa subsp. pubescens, also known as the smooth lady's mantle, is a plant species within the alchemilla genus, characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Alchemilla fissa subsp. pubescens include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce menstrual cramps, and provide relief from skin irritations. Alchemilla fissa subsp. pubescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
